global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central graphic area and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing a contrasting backdrop for the foreground elements.

elements.label: Main graphic area
elements.description: A central area featuring abstract shapes, including a large circle and square, rendered in a muted color palette.

elements.label: Secondary graphic area
elements.description: A smaller graphic area overlapping with the main subject, containing additional abstract shapes in a similar muted color scheme.

elements.label: Cashback offer
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Earn cashback daily' prominently displayed in the center, with a smaller tagline below it in a lighter font.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' appears at the top of the ad in a bold, modern font, contrasting against the dark background.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Shop now' in white, positioned at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold text, cashback offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Built for peace of mind, SwiftStack, Shop now
